name: snapzy
title: Snapzy
description: Capture screenshots, record your screen, and manage captures with Snapzy.
author: chkzz

commands.name: capture-fullscreen
commands.title: Capture Fullscreen
commands.subtitle: Snapzy
commands.description: Take a fullscreen screenshot with Snapzy.

commands.name: capture-area
commands.title: Capture Area
commands.subtitle: Snapzy
commands.description: Select an area to screenshot with Snapzy.

commands.name: capture-application
commands.title: Capture Application
commands.subtitle: Snapzy
commands.description: Capture an application window with Snapzy.

commands.name: capture-active-window
commands.title: Capture Active Window
commands.subtitle: Snapzy
commands.description: Instantly capture the focused window with Snapzy, no selection step.

commands.name: capture-area-annotate
commands.title: Capture Area and Annotate
commands.subtitle: Snapzy
commands.description: Capture an area and open Snapzy annotation tools.

commands.name: capture-scrolling
commands.title: Scrolling Capture
commands.subtitle: Snapzy
commands.description: Start a scrolling screenshot with Snapzy.

commands.name: capture-ocr
commands.title: Capture Text (OCR)
commands.subtitle: Snapzy
commands.description: Extract text from a screen region with Snapzy OCR.

commands.name: capture-object-cutout
commands.title: Object Cutout
commands.subtitle: Snapzy
commands.description: Capture and cut out an object from the screen with Snapzy.

commands.name: record-application
commands.title: Record Application
commands.subtitle: Snapzy
commands.description: Start recording an application window with Snapzy.

commands.name: show-shortcuts
commands.title: Show Shortcuts
commands.subtitle: Snapzy
commands.description: Show the Snapzy keyboard shortcuts overlay.
